final_prompt.prompt:
Design a brand-ready logo for a cultural-experiential Israeli project.

Style/medium:
  Custom logo wordmark design
  Modern, bold, playful but controlled
  Innovative and highly memorable
  Friendly and approachable — not childish, not generic

Composition:
  Based on the attached logo as the exact base
  Retain the two tilted capsule/ticket shapes
  Retain the playful dynamic composition
  Retain the overall friendly and experiential feeling

Subject:
  Refined and strengthened version of the existing logo
  Custom-designed Hebrew wordmark as the focal typographic element

Scene/backdrop:

Lighting/mood:

Color palette:
  Retain the main color idea from the original logo

Materials/textures:

Text (verbatim):
  קפסולת הזמן

Constraints:
  Hebrew typography must feel custom-designed and brand-specific — not a generic rounded Hebrew font
  Letters should carry distinctive personality, especially: ק, פ, ס, ת, ז, מ, ן
  Letterforms: rounded, bold, modern, iconic — as if specially crafted for this project
  Avoid: childish cartoon style, generic bubble font, handwritten look, ornamental tricks, overly decorative details

Avoid:
  Generic or off-the-shelf Hebrew typefaces
  Childish or cartoon aesthetic
  Handwritten or ornamental styling
  Any deviation from the original logo's core concept and capsule/ticket shapes
